$schema.description: JSON Schema reference — add this for editor autocomplete

project.description: Human-readable project name shown in reports and adapter files

failOnSeverity.description: Severity levels that cause `prometheus validate` and `prometheus ci` to exit 1

warnOnSeverity.description: Severity levels that print a warning but do not fail CI

largeFileThreshold.description: Lines-of-code threshold above which a file is flagged as large (TECH_DEBT)

ignoredFolders.description: Folder names to skip entirely during scanning

criticalLibPaths.description: Glob patterns for files that must never be modified without a governance review

requiredFiles.description: File paths (relative to repo root) that must exist for `prometheus doctor` to pass

secretPatterns.description: Regex patterns for secret detection — added to the built-in set

reportMaxAgeDays.description: Maximum age of .prometheus/report.json in days before it is considered stale

protectedBranches.description: Branch names that receive extra scrutiny in validate and ci commands

disabledRules.description: Rule IDs or category names to skip entirely (e.g. ["GATE_001", "monday_write_no_gate"])

severityRules.description: Override the default severity for specific rule categories

reportMaxAgeDays.description: Maximum report age in days before doctor flags it as stale

requiredScripts.description: npm script names that must be present in package.json

requiredFiles.description: Files that must exist relative to the repo root

requiredIdeDirs.description: IDE config directories that must exist (e.g. [".claude", ".cursor"])

defaultBase.description: Default git base ref for diff (e.g. "origin/main")

gates.description: Additional gate checks to run before validate

outputPath.description: Write findings to this file in addition to stdout

workflow.description: Path to the generated GitHub Actions workflow file

requiresSecrets.description: GitHub Actions secret names that must be configured

generatedSections.description: Section IDs to preserve across scan runs

riskyFilePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files that are always flagged as risky

ideTools.description: IDE tool configuration (key: tool name, value: config path)

scripts.description: Custom script overrides for prometheus commands

Severity.description: BLOCKER: CI fails. HIGH: warning. MEDIUM/LOW/TECH_DEBT: advisory.
